title: Pyrex Frying Pan Master Stainless Steel for Induction, Electric, Gas and Ceramic Glass Hobs, ‎Cookware, Kitchen (26cm Pyrex Master Frying Pan), MX24BFX/HDL, Silver
features: MASTER BY Pyrex - Cook like the pro chefs with this great range of non-coated stainless steel frying pan from the Pyrex Master Pan Collection.
NON-COATED STAINLESS STEEL - pans are lightweight, easy to use, and versatile pans that can even be placed in the oven.

HEALTHY MATERIAL - polished stainless steel and uncoated - ensures that it does not react with food and affect the taste of cooking to ensure healthy cooking. Stainless steel handle with hand-polished processing offers a secure and comfortable hold.

SUITABLE FOR ALL STOVES/DISHWASHER SAFE, OVEN SAFE - The Pyrex Master Frying Pan is suitable for all types of hobs, including gas, electric, halogen, induction, and glass hobs. Oven-safe up to 220°C Dishwasher safe - particularly easy to clean.
GREAT CHOICE OF SIZES – For all Kitchen needs 24cm, 26cm, 28cm and 30cm
WARRANTY - Pyrex offer a ten-year warranty and high-quality after-sales service
description: Cook like the pro chefs with this great range of non-coated stainless steel frying pan from the Pyrex Master Pan Collection Non-Coated Stainless steel pans are lightweight, easy to use, and versatile pans that can even be placed in the oven. Being uncoated, this pan is ideal for searing, browning, and charring all meats, fish, and vegetables. It'll help you to produce delicious caramelised flavours, and aromas, whilst keeping the inside tender. For a bit of theatre in the kitchen, they can even be used to flambé food as the flames won't damage the pan.
